zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Goode於1540年出生在英國武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Walter Goode36歲，母親Joan Whitston30歲。他於1564年3月30日與Joane Doane在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1584年3月30日在英國武斯特斯爾貝德利享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Goode于1540年出生在英国武斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Walter Goode36岁，母亲Joan Whitston30岁。他于1564年3月30日与Joane Doane在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1584年3月30日在英国武斯特斯爾貝德利享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Goode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Good  . This name has been used in Ireland since the 16th century.
Possibly an Americanized form of Dutch   Goede  .

variants.name: Good
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English gode ‘good’ (Old English gōd).

English: from the Middle English personal name Gode, representing either Old English Goda (male) or Gode (female), in part a byname and in part a short form of various compound names with the first element gōd, or perhaps a pet form of Old French names in God- such as Godfrey .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German Gut and Guth , or Dutch Goed and Goede .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Goode was born in 1540, in Worcestershire, England, his father, Walter Goode, was 36 and his mother, Joan Whitston, was 30. He married Joane Doane on 30 March 1564, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 30 March 1584, in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Goode est né en 1540, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Goode, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan Whitston, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Joane Doane le 30 mars 1564, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 mars 1584, à Bewdley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Goode 1540 in Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Goode 36 und seine Mutter Joan Whitston 30. Er hat am 30. März 1564 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England Joane Doane geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. März 1584 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Goode è nato il nel 1540 nel Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Walter Goode, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Joan Whitston, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Joane Doane il 30 marzo 1564, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 marzo 1584, nel Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Goodeが1540年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter Goodeは36歳，母Joan Whitstonは30歳であった。1564年3月30日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターでJoane Doaneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1584年3月30日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベウドリーで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Goode(이)가 1540년 영국 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Goode(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Whitston(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1564년 3월 30일 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 Joane Doane(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1584년 3월 30일 영국 워스스터실르 뷰들리에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Goode nasceu em 1540, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Goode, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan Whitston, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Doane em 30 de março de 1564, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de março de 1584, em Bewdley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Goode родился в 1540 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Goode было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Whitston, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Doane 30 марта 1564 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 марта 1584 г. в местности бюдли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Goode nació en 1540, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Goode, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Joan Whitston, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Joane Doane el 30 de marzo de 1564, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1584, en Bewdley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
